title: EVT.BSP.001.PALIER_HAUSSE — Tier upgraded (design-time documentation)
description: DESIGN-TIME DOCUMENTATION ONLY. This schema describes the abstract business fact 'a beneficiary has progressed to a higher autonomy tier' at the meta-model level (business event, per ADR-BCM-URBA-0007). PER ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 RULE 2, NO AUTONOMOUS BUS MESSAGE CORRESPONDS TO THIS SCHEMA. Only the paired resource event RVT.BSP.001.FRANCHISSEMENT_ENREGISTRE generates wire-level messages on RabbitMQ. This file exists for: (a) traceability of the BCM business-event meta-model into a machine-readable artifact, (b) governance review, (c) consumer documentation describing the abstract fact independently of its wire-level projection. DO NOT publish payloads validated against this schema on the bus. The wire-level contract is RVT.BSP.001.FRANCHISSEMENT_ENREGISTRE.schema.json. Correlation key: 'identifiant_dossier'. Resolution to OBJ.REF.001.FICHE_BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne is the consumer's responsibility via CAP.REF.001.BEN.

identifiant_transition.description: Unique identifier for this tier transition (OBJ.BSP.001.CHANGEMENT_PALIER.identifiant_transition).

identifiant_dossier.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the relevant participation case. Resolution path to OBJ.REF.001.FICHE_BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne via CAP.REF.001.BEN is the consumer's concern.

sens.description: Transition direction. For EVT.BSP.001.PALIER_HAUSSE the sens is necessarily FRANCHISSEMENT (upward). The downward business event is EVT.BSP.001.PALIER_RETROGRADE (out of Epic 1 scope). Both 'const' and single-value 'enum' are declared for cross-validator compatibility.

declencheur.description: Trigger of the transition (OBJ.BSP.001.CHANGEMENT_PALIER.declencheur). ALGORITHME = autonomy-tier engine. SURCHARGE_PRESCRIPTEUR = prescriber override.

timestamp_transition.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the transition.
